svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 350px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 72px; margin-left: 231px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

br.hr:
IF condition THEN conclusion
Production rules
Logical implications

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 242, 204), rgb(40, 29, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 218px; height: 1px; padding-top: 332px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

br.hr:
Safety boundaries
Domain invariants
Search-space limits

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 232, 212), rgb(31, 47, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 258px; height: 1px; padding-top: 332px; margin-left: 461px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

br.hr:
Facts → intermediate conclusions → final conclusion
Ordered sequence of inference steps
Explainable derivation trace

path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(130, 179, 102), rgb(68, 110, 44));
fill: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(214, 182, 86), rgb(109, 81, 0));
fill: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(184, 84, 80), rgb(215, 129, 126));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 678px; height: 1px; padding-top: 515px; margin-left: 21px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #666666;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#666666, #959595); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div: Example: Fact “Drone A in no-fly zone” → Rule “flight prohibited in no-fly zone” → Constraint “safety distance ≥ 100 m” → Conclusion “Drone A violates regulation”
